creator: adrik@salesmanager.nl
text:
This is still broken since WITH_OPENSSL_PORT was depreciated.
When using 'DEFAULT_VERSIONS+= ssl=openssl' in /etc/make.conf, openssl from base is still used!

# grep openssl /etc/make.conf
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+= ssl=openssl
# pkg info -d ipsec-tools
ipsec-tools-0.8.2_1:
        openssl-1.0.2i,1
# ldd /usr/local/sbin/racoon
/usr/local/sbin/racoon:
        libipsec.so.0 => /usr/local/lib/libipsec.so.0 (0x8008cc000)
        libcrypto.so.7 => /lib/libcrypto.so.7 (0x800ae2000)
        libreadline.so.8 => /lib/libreadline.so.8 (0x800ed8000)
        libcrypt.so.5 => /lib/libcrypt.so.5 (0x80111b000)
        libc.so.7 => /lib/libc.so.7 (0x80133b000)
        libncurses.so.8 => /lib/libncurses.so.8 (0x8016e8000)
#
